text_blocks.text: Within the past ten years, the amount
of social networking sites available to the public
has greatly increased as well as the number
of adolescents using them. Several sources
report a high proportion of adolescents who
use social media 73% of 12-17 year odds
reported having at least one social networking
profile; two-thirds (68%) of teens text every
day, half (51%) visit social networking sites
daily, and 11% send or receive tweets at least
once every day. In fact, more than a third (34%)
of teens visit their main social networking site
several times a day. One in four (23%) teens
are "heavy" social media users, meaning they
use at least two different types of social
